mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.order_number, o.user_id, u.username, o.total_amount, o.status, o.created_at, o.updated_at FROM orders o LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT o.id, o.order_number, o.user_id, u.username, o.total_amount, o.status, o.created_at, o.updated_at FROM orders o LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id ORDER BY o.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, o.id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT NVL(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE status != 'CANCELLED'
